Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La for Anthony Bedoussac (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it still needs the original apostille. Ms. La stated that she has it with her and provided it to the Court for filing and to have it placed in the will file. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
